MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RAKESH N. PATEL AKA ROCKY PATEL AKA NICK PATEL Motion For Court Order Granting Relief From Default

No appearance.

Prior to the hearing, Defendant's counsel sent an email to the court requesting that the matter be taken off calendar pursuant to the parties stipulation, which the court approved.

Theefore, the tentative ruling is vacated and DEFENDANT RAKESH N. PATEL AKA ROCKY PATEL AKA NICK PATEL'S Motion For Court Order Granting Relief From Default is ordered off calendar by the court.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
